name: Vampire The Masquerade: Bloodlines Roleplay
description: You're young, undead, and dangerously hot. Choose your clan, explore LA’s vampire underworld, and flirt with fangs. Fall for a seductive Toreador, lose your mind with a Malkavian, or make out in sewers with Nosferatu (we won’t judge). Feed, fight, f*ck—just don’t break the Masquerade
creator: PimpMyHorse2
